---
title: Session 03 - Preparing the study material
number-sections: false
description: We follow the steps of CREP and prepare our study material
---

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Instructor notes"}
- Create a shared login for the online survey system
:::

## Overview

| Topic                                  | Duration | Notes |
| :------------------------------------- | :------: | ----- |
| Git Troubleshooting                    |    30    |       |
| Wrap-up Homework: p-hack, target paper |    30    |       |
| Group work:  Preparing the study       |    45    |       |
| Homework: formr                        |    5     |       |

: {.striped}


## Group work: Prepare the study

Group tasks:

- Prepare our OSF project (steps 5-8 of the [CREP Guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/13iShvF76RDlLSmWMzhr5jeLAetzRQGHobCQSovkO1mo/edit#heading=h.iwoegiam7xwd))
- Prepare our study material (see [Step 4 of the CREP guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/13iShvF76RDlLSmWMzhr5jeLAetzRQGHobCQSovkO1mo/edit#heading=h.ptw59d3ovcng))
  - Translate the [study material](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kecIQPDUe3O7Ed7qzVOv2KX7LRnARbaY/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=108982640291853577145&rtpof=true&sd=true)
  - Search for an alternative awe-inducing video and neutral control video.
  - Write an exact "screenplay": In which order are the instructions, interventions, items presented?
- Think about possible extensions, add them to this [document](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1zkSlr2Cfi998LuCbHX2NEk_eiSvGBfvAV4pX1YhEFU0/edit?usp=sharing)


<!-- 
::: {.callout-tip title="Power analysis"}
We will do a detailed power analysis later - for the IRB approval, we do this (one-sided testing, 80% power, taking the originally found effect size at face value):

```{r}
library(pwr)
pwr.t.test(d=0.51, power=.80, type="two.sample", alternative="greater")
```
:::
 -->


## Homework: Learn formr

There are various resources - choose according to your preference:

- The [official formr documentation](https://formr.org/documentation) (written)
- A [46 min. video tutorial](https://invidious.nerdvpn.de/watch?v=BYESYTRufyE) by Alan Jern (in English)
- A [2h workshop video](https://leibniz-psychology.org/practices-and-tools-of-open-science/umfragen-erstellen-mit-formr) by Kai Horstmann (in German)
- [7 short videos](https://invidious.nerdvpn.de/watch?v=tNfNWogGCc4&list=PLykZOoFFtCkgkyz8BofTBHJ0d9xYNuZMO) (36 min. total) by Daniela Feistauer (in German)

**Deliverable**: Log into the [OSC formr platform](https://formr.osc.lmu.de/admin/account/logout) (use the credentials provided in Moodle), create a new **survey** with your name, link a Google sheet with some questions of your choice, and create a **run** with your name that contains only this survey and a goodbye screen.
